description_long: This is a modern white Mercedes-Benz minivan with a streamlined, utilitarian design, commonly seen in urban environments for cargo or passenger transport. The body is predominantly white with black trim around the windows, bumpers, and lower side panels, and it features large, tinted windows on the front and sides. The front grille displays the iconic Mercedes-Benz emblem, and the headlights are sleek and angular, contributing to a contemporary appearance. The minivan has two side doors, with at least one sliding door visible, and rear double doors for easy access to the cargo or passenger area. The wheels are solid white with a simple, robust design, and the rear lights are vertically oriented for high visibility. The roof is smooth and unadorned, with no visible roof rack, and the overall build suggests a spacious interior suitable for various urban uses.
description: A white Mercedes-Benz minivan with black trim, large tinted windows, and a smooth, modern design. It features sliding and rear double doors, with a spacious, utilitarian build.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, including the sliding door, black trim, and solid white wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the Mercedes-Benz grille, angular headlights, and large tinted windshield.
description_view_2: Side view of the right profile, similar to the left, with visible sliding door and rear access.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the double rear doors, vertical taillights, and absence of a roof rack.
attribute_window_configuration: Large front windshield, two front side windows, two large sliding side windows, and two rear door windows.
